name: Rinelda Smitt
appearance: A bright-eyed girl moving through slaughter with theatrical delight and terrible focus.
personality: Cruel, gleeful, and fascinated by power over death.
wants: To impress Siegfried and revel in the destruction she helps command.

name: Mordov Refugees
appearance: Mud-caked survivors wrapped in blankets, speaking as if the fog still follows them.
personality: Shocked, exhausted, and grateful to be believed.
